message:
feat(conformance): add TLS runtime conformance tests for strict/hardened policy contracts

Add 124 lines of TLS-focused conformance tests to the fr-conformance
harness, exercising the new TLS config subsystem introduced in the
prior commit:

- valid_tls_config() test helper: constructs a fully-populated
  TlsConfig with TLSv1.2+1.3, cert/key/CA paths, Required auth,
  and cluster announce port — used as baseline for all TLS tests
- fr_p2c_009_e013_strict_runtime_tls_rejection: verifies that
  strict mode fail-closes when TLS port is None (safety gate
  contract violation), validates the threat contract matches
  config_downgrade_abuse/s0/fail_closed, and checks structured
  log emission
- fr_p2c_009_e013_hardened_non_allowlisted_rejection: verifies
  that hardened mode with MetadataSanitization removed from
  allowlist rejects the same invalid config with the correct
  hardened_nonallowlisted_rejected reason code and s2 severity
- fr_p2c_009_e011_runtime_rejects_invalid_tls_operational_knob:
  verifies that max_new_tls_connections_per_cycle=0 triggers an
  operational_knob_contract_violation with fail-closed/s0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
